.breadcrumb { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; list-style: none; background-color: #f8f9fa; border-radius: 0.25rem; } .breadcrumb-item { display: flex; align-items: center; } .breadcrumb-item + .breadcrumb-item::before { content: none; } .breadcrumb-separator { padding: 0 0.5rem; color: #6c757d; } .breadcrumb-item.active { color: #6c757d; }
